# Researcher Degrees of Freedom

The analytic choices live in a few recurring families: model specification,
covariate and confounder selection, variable transformations, missing-data
handling, exposure and outcome coding, and sample construction. Each choice is
defensible on its own; the trouble is combinatorial, since independent choices
multiply. Six binary choices already give 64 analyses, and realistic studies
reach thousands.

*(Full chapter in preparation.)*
